title: Transcript:Hazeel Cult/Historical
wikitext:
{{Transcript|quest|link=Hazeel Cult}}
{{Transcript list|Ceril Carnillean|Guard (Carnillean)|Philipe Carnillean|Butler Jones|Claus the Chef|Henryeta Carnillean|Clivet|Alomone|Hazeel Cultist}}

==Starting off==
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Blooming, thieving, weirdo cultists! Why don't they leave me alone? String 'em all up, that's what I say!
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|What's wrong?}}
** '''Player:''' What's wrong?
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' It's those blooming cultists from the forest! Those freaks keep breaking into my house!
** '''Player:''' Have they taken much?
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' They first broke in months ago and stole a suit of armour. The strange thing is that they've broken in four times since but taken nothing.
** '''Player:''' And you are...?
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Why, I am Sir Ceril Carnillean! We really are quite a famous bloodline... who've played a vital role in the politics of Ardougne for many generations.
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Perhaps you would be able to assist me in returning the stolen armour? For a modest cash reward of course!
** {{tselect|Select an Option}}
** {{topt|No thanks. I've got other plans.}}
*** '''Player:''' No thanks. I've got other plans.
*** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' No wonder I'm the one with the big house, and you're the one on the streets.
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|Yes, of course, I'd be happy to help.}}
*** '''Player:''' Yes, of course, I'd be happy to help.
*** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' That's very noble of you sirrah! I caught a glimpse of the thieves leaving but due to... uh.. yeah, my cold I was unable to give chase.
*** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' They're some kind of crazy cult who dress all in black, and hang out near the cave entrance in the forest south of here.
*** '''Player:''' How do you know that?
*** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' My old butler, Higson, once followed them to their hideout there. Unfortunately the next night he died in his sleep.
*** '''Player:''' That's awful!
*** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' No, it's ok. A replacement arrived the next day. He's been great - cooks an excellent broth!
*** '''Player:''' Ok. I'll see what I can do.
*** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|You probably deserve it.}}
** '''Player:''' You probably deserve it.
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' And who are YOU to judge ME? Hmmm. You look like a peasant anyway. I'm wasting my time talking to you.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|You seem uptight, I'll leave you alone.}}
** '''Player:''' You seem uptight. I'll leave you alone.
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Yes, I doubt you could help anyway.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril again===
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Have you had any luck yet?
* '''Player:''' I'm afraid not Ceril.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' That's SIR Ceril you blooming scoundrel! Show respect when addressing someone of my rank! It's strange you haven't recovered it yet though as Jones seemed quite sure of their location.
* '''Player:''' Yeah, well, just unlucky I guess.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Butler Jones===
* '''Player:''' Hello. What is this building?
* '''Butler Jones:''' This is the home of Sir Ceril Carnillean of the noble Carnillean family. You're welcome to look around, but I'm afraid I'll have to keep an eye on you.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Recently we've been having a real problem with thieves and strange cultists coming out of the forest for some reason.
* '''Player:''' That's a shame.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Yes, well, these things are bound to happen when you're as wealthy as the Carnilleans.
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|Have you any more info on the Carnilleans?}}
** '''Player:''' Have you any more info on the Carnilleans?
** '''Butler Jones:''' There's a lot I could tell you about the Carnillean family history. However, I'm afraid if I did speak about such matters I would be at risk of losing my job.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|How long have you worked here?}}
** '''Player:''' How long have you worked here?
** '''Butler Jones:''' Long enough to know the Carnilleans are not as innocent or noble as they seem.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Ok then, take care.}}
** '''Player:''' Ok then, take care.
** '''Butler Jones:''' You too.
** {{tact|end}}

====Using any item on Claus' range====
* '''Claus Carnillean:''' Oi - I don't want people messing around with my range!
* {{tact|end}}

==Confronting the Hazeel Cult==
* '''Player:''' Do you know the Carnilleans?
* '''Clivet:''' You mind your business, I'll mind mine.
* '''Player:''' Look, I KNOW you're hiding something. I've heard theres a cult hideout down here.
* '''Clivet:''' If you want to stay healthy you'll leave now.
* '''Player:''' I have my orders.
* '''Clivet:''' So... that two faced cold hearted snob has made you fall for his propaganda eh?
* '''Player:''' Sir Ceril Carnillean is a man of honour!
* '''Clivet:''' Is he now? Is he REALLY? There is a lot more to the Carnilleans than meets the eye you fool...
* '''Clivet:''' And none of it is honourable.
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|What do you mean?}}
** '''Player:''' What do you mean?
** '''Clivet:''' The Carnillean home does not belong to them. The builder of the house was Lord Hazeel, one of the Mahjarrat followers of Zamorak. Many years ago there was a civil war
** '''Clivet:''' in this land, and the hateful Saradominists declared war upon all Zamorakians who lived here. Lord Hazeel nobly would not repent his beliefs, and the Carnilleans harrassed
** '''Clivet:''' Hazeel and his followers for many decades. One fateful night, under cover of darkness, they stormed his home in an angry mob torturing and butchering all loyal
** '''Clivet:''' Zamorakians they encountered inside. The following morning, the Carnillean forefathers moved into the empty household and claimed it as their own.
** '''Clivet:''' They have grown fat on the hard work of Lord Hazeel ever since. Unluckily for them Lord Hazeel as a Mahjarrat had access to powers and enchantments they knew nothing
** '''Clivet:''' about, and made preparations for his return when first they began to storm his home. Soon the day will come when he will return to wreak his vengeance upon the thieves!
** '''Player:''' The politics and histories of Ardougne do not concern me. I have been given a job and intend to see it through to the end.
** '''Clivet:''' Well then friend, perhaps I can offer you a different job then? Sooner or later Our master WILL return to this land; those faithful to him will be well rewarded.
** '''Clivet:''' Join our cult and assist us in his restoration, and you will be well rewarded; try and prevent his return and suffer the wrath of Zamorak and the Mahjarrat.
** {{tselect|Select an Option}}
** {{topt|You're crazy, I'd never help you.}}
*** '''Player:''' You're crazy, I'd never help you.
*** '''Clivet:''' Then you are a fool. Go back to your small minded mundane little life; you will never know the glories you could have tasted as one of us!
*** {{tbox|The man jumps onto the raft and pushes off down into the sewer system.}}
*** {{mes|Clivet: You'll never find us...}}
*** {{tact|end}}
** {{topt|So what would I have to do?}}
*** '''Player:''' So what would I have to do?
*** '''Clivet:''' You must prove your loyalty to our cause. Killing one of the Carnillean household should be sufficient proof of your dedication to resurrecting our master Lord Hazeel.
*** '''Clivet:''' So what say you adventurer? Join our side against the Carnillean thieves?
*** {{tselect|Select an Option}}
*** {{topt|No. I won't do it.}}
**** '''Player:''' No. I won't do it.
**** '''Clivet:''' Then you are a fool. Go back to your small minded, mundane little life; you will never know the glories you could have tasted as one of us!
**** {{tact|end}}
*** {{topt|Ok, count me in.}}
**** '''Player:''' Ok, count me in.
**** '''Clivet:''' Excellent. It takes a rare character to see through the cursed Carnillean lies. I can tell you are a [man/lady] of exactly the right character to join the followers of Hazeel.
**** '''Clivet:''' Here. Take this poison. Pour it into their food, and once the deed is done, return here and speak to me once more.
**** {{tact|receives=[[Poison (item)]]}}
**** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|I've heard enough of your rubbish.}}
** '''Player:''' I've heard enough of your rubbish!
** '''Clivet:''' Then leave, fool!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Clivet again===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Clivet:''' So. You've returned. Now do you want to know the truth about the 'honourable' Carnilleans?
* {{tselect|Select an Option}}
* {{topt|What do you mean?}}
** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|I've heard enough of your rubbish.}}
** {{tact|above}}

===Using the raft without the correct water valve settings===
* {{mes|The current is flowing against the raft. It will not move.}}

===Turning the sewer valve to the right===
* {{tbox|You turn the large metal valve to the right. Beneath your feet you can hear the sudden sound of rushing water from the sewer.}}

===Turning the sewer valve to the left===
* {{tbox|You turn the large metal valve to the left. Beneath your feet you can hear the sudden sound of rushing water from the sewer.}}

===Sucessfully using the raft with the correct water valve settings===
* {{tbox|The raft washes up the sewer, past the islands until it reaches the end of the sewer passage.}}

===Talking to Alomone===
* '''Alomone:''' How did YOU get in here?
* '''Player:''' I've come for the Carnillean family armour. Hand it over, or face the consequences.
* '''Alomone:''' I thought I made it clear to the butler you could not be allowed to interfere with our mission. The incompetent fool must be going soft.
* '''Player:''' So the butler's part of your sordid little cult huh? Why is it ALWAYS the butler? I should have known...
* '''Alomone:''' Well you won't live long enough to tell anyone! DIE!!!
* {{tact|Alomone attacks the player.}}

===Talking to a Hazeel cultist===
* '''Player:''' Hi.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' What? Who are you and why did you come here? It doesn't matter, leave now adventurer. While you still can.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril again===
* '''Player:''' Hello Ceril.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' That's SIR Ceril to you, you impudent scamp. Show a bit of respect to your betters. And shouldn't you be recovering my armour?
* '''Player:''' Yeah yeah, I'm on it, I'm ON it.
* {{tact|end}}

==Joining the Carnillean side==
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Clivet:''' Oh no... not you again.
* '''Player:''' WHERE is the cult hideout?
* '''Clivet:''' You're more of a fool than you look if you think you will ever find it. When Lord Hazeel is revived you will be first to grovel for his mercy!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril===
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Have you had any luck yet?
* '''Player:''' Hello Ceril. Yes, I found their hideout.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' SIR Ceril to you. But good work there! BLOOMING good work! Hand over the armour then.
* '''Player:''' Uh... yeah... about that... I interrogated a cult member at the hideout's entrance, but he managed to escape into the sewer system.
* '''Player:''' Seems they have some sort of grievance against you and your family. Something about some guy called Hazeel?
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Hazeel? Uh... umm... err.. hmmmm.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Nope, they're obviously a bunch of blooming loonies! Go find them and bring me back my blooming armour! Nobody steals from Sir Ceril Carnillean!!!

===Talking to Henryeta===
* '''Player:''' Hello madam.
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' I hope you found those awful hooligan cultists! I simply cannot sleep at night knowing they're loose!
* '''Player:''' I know, I know, I'm working on it ok?
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' I don't know, honestly I don't. There are some very odd folk around these parts.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to a Hazeel cultist===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' What? How did you get in here? Who are you and why do you come here? It doesn't matter, you will not live long enough to tell anyone of our hideout!
* {{tact|The Hazeel Cultist attacks the player.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Alomone before obtaining the armour===
* '''Alomone:''' How did YOU get in here?
* '''Player:''' I've come for the Carnillean family armour. Hand it over, or face the consequences.
* '''Alomone:''' I thought I made it clear to the butler you could not be allowed to interfere with our mission. The incompetent fool must be going soft.
* '''Player:''' So the butler's part of your sordid little cult huh? Why is it ALWAYS the butler? I should have known...
* '''Alomone:''' Well you won't live long enough to tell anyone! DIE!!!
* {{tact|Alomone attacks.}}

===Talking to Alomone after obtaining the armour===
* '''Player:''' Hello Alomone.
* '''Alomone:''' Out of my way idiot! We are preparing matters your puny mind could not hope to understand!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril before obtaining the armour or after losing it{{fact}}===
* '''Player:''' Ceril. How are you?
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' I'm fine. Where's my armour?
* '''Player:''' Uh... I didn't get it yet... I DID find the cult's hideout though!
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Well what are you waiting for? I'm not paying you to blooming sight see you know!
* {{tact|end}}
===Talking to a Hazeeel cultist after obtaining the armour===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' What? An intruder? HERE? How did you get in here? You must leave! NOW!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Clivet after obtaining the armour===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Clivet:''' You again! You meddle in our affairs too much! When Lord Hazeel returns to this realm he will lay a mighty vengeance upon you!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Henryeta after obtaining the armour===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' Oh, hello again adventurer. I trust you did not have too much trouble dealing with those hooligans?
* '''Player:''' Nah, it was a piece of cake.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Butler Jones with the armour===
* '''Player:''' Jones. We need to talk.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Yes? You need some help with your quest?
* '''Player:''' Drop the act Jones. I know you're in league with the cultists.
* '''Butler Jones:''' W-what? N-no I'm not, don't be silly!
* '''Player:''' Listen pal, I went to your hideout, I heard them talking about you. You're fooling nobody.
* '''Butler Jones:''' You think you're so smart don't you? You might think you know what's going on but you have no idea.
* '''Player:''' I know all I need to know and when I reveal the truth you're going directly to jail.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Oh, you think so do you? You think that silly old fool Ceril will take YOUR word over MINE? He trusts me completely!
* '''Player:''' We'll see about that.
* '''Butler Jones:''' This is your last warning adventurer: keep your nose out of our business.
* {{tact|end}}

===Returning the armour to Ceril===
* '''Player:''' Look! I've recovered your armour!
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Well done! I must say I am very impressed! Come on, hand it over.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Before we send you on your way with your payment, I'll just get Jones to whip you up a batch of his special broth.
* '''Player:''' I'd rather not if it's all the same to you. I overheard the cultists talking, and apparently Jones is in league with them.
* {{tact|If the player is on the {{FloorNumber|uk=0}}:}}
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' W-what? RIGHT! You! Come with me upstairs! We're going to blooming well sort this out right now once and for all!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tact|If the player is on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}}:}}
** '''Ceril Carnillean:''' W-what? RIGHT! You! We're going to blooming well sort this out right now once and for all!
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Jones! This commoner says you had something to do with the theft of my armour. What do you have to say for yourself about that?
* '''Butler Jones:''' It wasn't me m'lud. I am, as you know, a loyal servant.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Humph. Quite right too. I cannot fathom why this scoundrel would accuse you of such a crime without evidence to back up his accusations.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Right. I have decided. I have given my word as a nobleman to reward you for your efforts in retrieving my armour.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' but I must also compensate Jones for this terrible slander you have made against him.
* {{tbox|Sir Ceril gives you 5 gold. Sir Ceril gives Jones 1995 gold.}}
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Now take it and leave you scoundrel! And don't darken my doorstep again!
* '''Butler Jones:''' Don't worry m'lud, this fool won't be bothering us any more.
* {{tbox|Jones smirks at you. You are going to need more than words to prove Jones' treachery.}}
* {{Qact|Fake quest complete!}}

===Talking to the guard===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Guard:''' Hello again adventurer. Still hanging around here eh? I'll be honest, I'm glad someone of your ability is around to assist me in case of trouble.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril again===
* '''Player:''' You owe me money.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' I owe you nothing you scoundrel! Now get out or I'll have Jones throw you out!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Butler Jones again===
* '''Butler Jones:''' Cretin. Did you think you could 'save the day' just by accusing me? We've been planning this for YEARS. your meddling has been nothing more than a minor inconvenience.
* '''Butler Jones:''' When Lord Hazeel returns, the likes of you and the arrogant Carnilleans will be first to suffer his vengeance.
* '''Player:''' Not if I can help it!
* '''Butler Jones:''' That's basically my point. You cannot help it. Now begone!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Henryeta again===
* '''Player:''' Hello Henryeta.
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' You! Don't think you can go accusing our trusted staff and then waltz up to me as though nothing has happened!
* '''Player:''' Everything I said was the truth.
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' HA! Don't be so ridiculous! Next you'll be trying to tell me Jones murdered our old butler!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Alomone again===
* '''Player:''' Hi.
* '''Alomone:''' I have no time to waste with the likes of you do-gooder.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Clivet again===
* '''Player:''' Hello again.
* '''Clivet:''' You again. Mark my words meddler; when Lord Hazeel returns you will be punished most severely for your interference in our schemes.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Claus===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.{{fact|Might be "Hello Claus."}}
* '''Claus the chef:''' Hello! How are you today?
* '''Player:''' Not bad, thanks.
* '''Claus the chef:''' Good good.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the guard again===
* '''Player:''' Hello guard.
* '''Guard:''' Hello adventurer. I hear you accused Jones the butler of being an accomplice of that loony cult. Is that true?
* '''Player:''' That's true, but nobody believes me.
* '''Guard:''' You have my utter faith adventurer. I can't openly defy my employer, Sir Ceril, but I'd like you to know that I think you're on the right track there.
* '''Player:''' Hey, thanks! That actually does make me feel a bit better!
* '''Guard:''' You've already proven to me that you're a law-abiding citizen. Besides, I always found it suspicious that Jones would just show up here on the doorstep the very day after the old butler died in such suspicious
* '''Guard:''' circumstances. Good luck in clearing your name. You have my support.

===Searching the cupboard===
* {{tbox|You search the cupbaord thoroughly. You find a bottle of poison and a mysterious amulet. You pass your discovery on to Ceril.}}
* '''Player:''' Ceril!
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' What do you want now you scoundrel?
* '''Player:''' Look what I've found in the cupboard!
* {{tbox|You hand Ceril the bottle of poison.}}
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' I... I don't believe it! Poison! JONES!
* '''Butler Jones:''' You called m'lud?
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' JONES! Just WHAT is this POISON doing here???
* '''Butler Jones:''' P-p-poison??? yeah... uh... well, hmm... Oh, it's for Killing rats.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Yes, that's right. Killing rats. I am but a loyal butler sir.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Rats eh? Yes, fair enough. Sorry to have doubted you old boy.
* '''Player:''' Then how about this?
* {{tbox|You show Ceril the amulet from the cupboard.}}
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Wh-what??? I've seen this amulet before... The thieves that broke in... One of them was wearing an identical amulet! Jones! I don't believe it!
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Jones! We trusted you! We took you into our home!
* '''Butler Jones:''' You senile old fool... It was all too easy! I should have killed you and your pathetic family weeks ago!
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' To think we took you in and trusted you... and this is how you repay us...
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' GUARD!
* {{tbox|A Guard rushes into the house.}}
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Take him away. Attempted murder and burglary.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Don't think this is the last you have heard of me Ceril. You and your family will pay dearly for this. GLORY TO HAZEEL! ALL PRAISE ZAMORAK!
* '''Guard:''' Now now. Come along quietly. There'll be no revenge where YOU'RE going - Port Sarim Jail.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' It looks like I am indebted to you sirrah!
* '''Player:''' No problem. We all make mistakes.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' But if it weren't for you... My whole family... we could have been... I apologise for my harshness before.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' the very least I can do is to reward you for your noble efforts, and to offer my sincerest apologies as a Lord and gentleman.
* '''Player:''' Thank you Lord Ceril.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' No, no, thank YOU! Feel free to stop by anytime adventurer!
* {{Qact|Quest complete!}}

==Joining the Hazeel side==
===Talking to Clivet after accepting his job===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Clivet:''' You have a mission for us adventurer. Go to the Carnilliean household and poison their meal to prove your loyalty.
* {{tact|end}}

===Losing the poison and talking to Clivet===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Clivet:''' You have a mission for us adventurer. Go to the Carnilliean household and poison their meal to prove your loyalty.
* '''Player:''' I lost the poison you gave me...
* {{tact|receives=[[Poison (item)]]}}
* '''Clivet:''' Useless. Take this and don't mess up this time. Lord Hazeel is depending on you.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to a Hazeel cultist===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' Leave me alone, can't you see I'm busy? We have a lot to do preparing for the imminent return of Lord Hazeel{{sic|No period.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Alomone===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Alomone:''' Can't you see I'm busy???
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the guard===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Guard:''' Hello. I hear tell you're after that loony cult who broke in the other night. It always gladdens me when civilians assist the law like this.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Butler Jones===
* '''Player:''' How long have you worked here?
* '''Butler Jones:''' Long enough to know the Carnilleans are not as innocent or noble as they seem.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril===
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Have you had any luck yet?
* '''Player:''' I'm afraid not Ceril.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' That's SIR Ceril you blooming scoundrel! Show respect when addressing someone of my rank! It's strange you haven't recovered it yet though as Jones seemed quite sure of their location.
* '''Player:''' Yeah, well, just unlucky I guess.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Henryeta===
* '''Player:''' Hello madam.
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' I hope you found those awful hooligan cultists! I simply cannot sleep at night knowing they're loose!
* '''Player:''' I'm afraid not.
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' Humph. You really are useless aren't you?
* '''Player:''' Yup. Guess I am.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Philipe===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' More toys! I want MORE TOYS!
* '''Player:''' Sorry, I don't have any.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' Sweets! Gimme sweets!
* '''Player:''' Nope, sorry, I don't have sweets either.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' I hate you! HATE YOU! Where's my mommy?
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Claus===
* '''Player:''' Hiya.
* '''Claus the chef:''' You're that adventurer the family asked to help get those weird cultists who keep breaking in, right?
* '''Player:''' That's me.
* '''Claus the chef:''' Good luck with that!
* {{tact|end}}

===Using the poison on the range===
* {{tbox|You pour the poison into the hot pot. The poison dissolves into the soup.}}

====Using another poison the range====
* {{tbox|Random murder isn't good}}

===Talking to Claus again===
* '''Claus the chef:''' Hello there. Caught any of those weird thieves yet?
* '''Player:''' Nope. Afraid not.
* '''Claus the chef:''' Well, keep at it!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Henryeta again===
* '''Player:''' Hello. Are you okay?
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' No, no I am very far from OK. Those hooligans slaughtered my precious Scruffy! I shall never recover! I am emotionally scarred for life!
* '''Player:''' It WAS only a dog you know...
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Butler Jones again===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Hello friend. I heard about your handiwork. Quite amusing really. I'm sure Hazeel will be pleased anyway; Keep up the good work!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Philipe again===
* '''Player:''' Hello youngster.
* {{tbox|The boy looks very upset.}}
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' Someone killed scruffy. I liked scruffy. He never told me off.
* '''Player:''' Yeah. It's a real shame.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' I want my mommy.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril again===
* '''Player:''' Hello again.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Oh.. the inhumanity... the cruelty.. the misery... the pain... my son is a good boy, really, but how could he give his dinner to Scruffy without having the servants test it for poison first? How? How could he be so
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' thoughtless and careless? He knows we are all under threat!
* '''Player:''' Scruffy?
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' He's been with our family for twenty years... that's 140 in dog years! The poor dog... what did HE ever do to deserve such a fate???
* '''Player:''' Your DOG got poisoned???
* '''Player:''' That's not right.
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' I agree! I hope whichever evildoer is responsible gets the full weight of the law brought upon them!
* '''Player:''' Uh.... yeah... me too.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the guard again===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Guard:''' Hello. The sarge is furious with me! Apparently those loony cultists have been back somehow without me noticing! I got a right roasting earlier...
* '''Guard:''' I don't exactly know what they got up to in the house... but that's besides the point. Sir Ceril was extremely upset, and I don't blame him.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to a Hazeel cultist again===
* '''Player:''' Hiya.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' Hello. Oh, are you new?
* '''Player:''' That's right.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' Well, it's always good to have a new recruit. Soon we shall retrive Hazeels' scroll and the ritual to revive him can begin!
* {{tact|end}}

==The scroll==
===Talking to Clivet===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Player:''' I poured the poison into the Carnillean's meal as requested. It didn't quite go to plan however.
* '''Clivet:''' Yes, we heard all about it from one of our sources. Hazeel has eyes everywhere! You have now proved your loyalty and will be rewarded when Hazeel is revived!
* '''Player:''' Ok. So what's next?
* '''Clivet:''' Here. Wear this amulet; it is called The Sign Of Hazeel. Not only will it identify you as one of our brotherhood to other followers but it is also key to finding our hideout.
** {{tact|If the player already has [[Hazeel's mark]]:}}
** '''Clivet:''' But of course, you already knew that, as you already have The Sign Of Hazeel.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tact|If the player does not have [[Hazeel's mark]]:}}
** '''Player:''' How does this amulet help do that then?
** '''Clivet:''' Hazeel in his wisdom when he built this lair did so by making it inaccessible unless the flow of the sewers is controlled exactly by the sewer valves above ground.
** '''Clivet:''' Each sewer valve must be correctly set before the water level is such that you may enter. The secret of the correct settings is contained in these amulets which honour him.
** '''Clivet:''' Starting from left to right, follow the design of the amulet to locate each sewer valve, and then turn each so as to follow the amulet design.
** '''Clivet:''' When you solve the sequence you may enter our hideout where our leader, Alomone, awaits you.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Alomone===
* '''Player:''' Hi there.
* '''Alomone:''' Well well well... So we have a new recruit. Clivet told me of your desire to join us in our glorious task to resurrect the mighty Hazeel from his slumber.
* '''Alomone:''' To accomplish this, we require the ancient words of summoning which will restore his shattered body, so that he can bring vengeance upon his enemies.
* '''Alomone:''' Hazeel in his mighty cunning anticipated that he might be defeated and secured within his home somewhere a powerful magical scroll that could restore him.
* '''Alomone:''' The words to this powerful enchantment are hidden within the Carnillean mansion, right under the nose of his unsuspecting foes. We already have an agent in place there
* '''Alomone:''' in their Butler Jones, a faithful follower to Hazeel. His loyalty to Hazeel is beyond questioning, yet he has been unsuccessful in locating the scroll containing the spell so far.
* '''Alomone:''' Go back to the mansion, and assist us in finding this enchantment, so that together we can restore Hazeel to his true power and glory!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Clivet again===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Clivet:''' Hello once more adventurer. All we need is Hazeels' magical scroll to bring him forth once more to this world.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to a Hazeel Cultist again===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' Well hello! Until we have retrieved the scroll of Hazeel we cannot resurrect our master. You must find it and bring it to us.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Alomone again===
* '''Player:''' Hello Alomone.
* '''Alomone:''' Hazeel has waited long enough to return! It is IMPERATIVE you find that spell!
* '''Player:''' Yeah yeah yeah, I'm on it, I'm ON it.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the guard===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Guard:''' Hello again adventurer. Still hanging around here eh? Let me know if you spot any of those loony cultists sniffing around.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril===
* '''Player:''' Ceril. How are you?
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Oh cruel world! Scruffy... I knew you well... I... just... don't think I can... go on without...
* {{tbox|Sir Ceril breaks down into tears.}}
* '''Player:''' Loosen up already. It was only a DOG.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Philipe again===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' Mommy said you're here to kill all the nasty men that keep breaking in.
* '''Player:''' Something like that.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' Can I watch?
* '''Player:''' No!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Henryeta again===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Henryeta Carnillean:''' I'm sorry. I am far too depressed to talk to anybody right now. Oh... poor Scruffy...
* '''Player:''' Yeah. Poor Scruffy.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Butler Jones===
* {{tact|If the player has Hazeel's mark equipped:}}
** '''Butler Jones:''' Hello again friend. I see you have the mark now; You should keep it covered up.
** '''Player:''' That? Oh, it's nothing. Just an old amulet.
** {{tact|continues}}
* {{tact|If the player does not have Hazeel's mark equipped:}}
** '''Butler Jones:''' Hello again friend. I see you decided to keep the mark of Hazeel discreetly about you.
** '''Player:''' Mark of Hazeel? I'm sure I don't know what you mean.
** {{tact|continues}}
* '''Butler Jones:''' You don't have to pretend with me, friend! Our cause is one and the same; the sooner Lord Hazeel is avenged the better for this city... and for us!
* '''Player:''' So do you have any idea where the scroll with the enchantment is?
* '''Butler Jones:''' No idea I'm afraid. I KNOW it's somewhere in this house, but for the life of me I can't find it anywhere. I've searched high and low for it!
* '''Player:''' And Sir Ceril doesn't suspect a thing?
* '''Butler Jones:''' Ha! That silly old fool? He can't see the forest for the trees.
* '''Player:''' I'll keep on looking then...
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Claus===
* '''Player:''' Hello Claus.
* '''Claus the chef:''' I... just CAN'T understand it! How? HOW could someone poison my delicious food without me even noticing??? I... I just don't understand!
* '''Claus the chef:''' Oh man... I hope I don't lose my job over this... but HOW? How did they do it? And why would the villain want to kill poor Scruffy anyway? He was such a good dog...
* {{tbox|Claus wipes away a tear.}}
* '''Player:''' Yeah. It's a real mystery, huh?
* {{tact|end}}

===Searching the crate in the kitchen===
* {{tbox|You search the crate. Under various food package you find an old rusty key.}}
* {{tact|receives=[[Chest key (Hazeel Cult)]]}}

===Using the Knock-at wall with the key===
* {{mes|You find a secret passageway.}}

===Chest===
* {{mes|This chest is locked shut.}}

* {{mes|You unlock the chest}}
* {{tbox|pic=Hazeel scroll detail.png|Inside the chest you find the Scroll of Hazeel.}}

===Talking to Jones after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hello Jones.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Have you recovered the scroll?
* {{tact|If the player has the scroll in their inventory:}}
* '''Player:''' I have it right here.
* '''Butler Jones:''' Incredible!
* '''Butler Jones:''' Quick, get it back to our hideout! These are glorious times indeed adventurer, when the mighty Hazeel returns things are REALLY going to change around here!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tact|If the player does not have the scroll in their inventory:}}
** '''Player:''' Uh... yeah... about that.. I don't exactly have it right now...
** '''Butler Jones:''' Incompetent fool! The future of our entire plans relies on that scroll! You MUST find it and take it back to our hideout as soon as possible!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Ceril after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hello Ceril. How's things?
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' SIR Ceril! SIR! And I'm not sure but I think the thieves have been back in my house.
* '''Player:''' What makes you say that?
* '''Ceril Carnillean:''' Well, either I'm going crazy, or theres been an intruder in Jones' room upstairs!
* '''Player:''' Oh, heh, ok then.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Philipe after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hello youngster.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' Why are you still here?
* '''Player:''' Just looking around.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' Have you got me some toys?
* '''Player:''' Nope.
* '''Philipe Carnillean:''' Then I don't like you!
* '''Player:''' Gee. I guess I'll just have to live with that then.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Claus after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hello there.
* '''Claus the chef:''' Those animals... how could they do that to poor Scruffy? What kind of lowlife would do that???
* '''Player:''' Get over it, it was only a dog.
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the guard after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hello guard.
* '''Guard:''' Hello adventurer. I hope you find the cult soon we have a horrible suspicion that there's been another burglary.
* '''Player:''' That's worrying.
* '''Guard:''' Yes, it is. What's worse is I have no idea how they keep doing it. It's like they do it under my very nose!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Clivet after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hello again.
* '''Clivet:''' Have you acquired the enchanted scroll required to resurrect Hazeel yet?
* {{tact|If the player has the scroll in their inventory:}}
** '''Player:''' Yes, it was in the house all along. Jones can't have looked that hard for it.
** '''Clivet:''' At last! The pieces are all in place for the glorious resurrection of Lord Hazeel! Now is the starting point for a new page in history, and our chance for vengeance!
** '''Clivet:''' Quickly now! Take the scroll to Alomone so that we may begin the ritual... and when Lord Hazeel returns I promise you that you shall be well rewarded!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tact|If the player does not have the scroll in their inventory:}}
** '''Player:''' Uh... yeah... about that... I seem to have, errm, misplayed it somewhere...
** '''Clivet:''' Incompetent cretin! Return to the Carnillean household and do not return again without it!
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to a Hazeel cultist after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Hazeel Cultist:''' Welcome back adventurer! Since you have brought us the scroll of Hazeel we can now perform the resurrection ceremony! Soon our master will return!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Alomone after obtaining the scroll===
* '''Player:''' Hi.
* '''Alomone:''' Have you brought me the scroll of restoration to complete the ritual?
* {{tact|If the player has the scroll in their inventory:}}
** '''Player:''' Yep. Got it right here.
** '''Alomone:''' FINALLY! Quickly, give it to me and I will begin the ritual!
** {{tbox|You hand Alomone the scroll of Hazeel.}}
** '''Alomone:''' Yes... YES! With the words contained within this scroll our Lord shall return to this realm and bring destruction to our enemies!
** '''Alomone:''' Watch adventurer, and witness the glorious rebirth of Hazeel!
** '''Alomone:''' Lord Hazeel... Lord Zamorak... I call upon the powers of evil... The forces of chaos... The strength of hatred...
** '''Alomone:''' Sentente sillaberi junque dithmento! Ia! Ia! dextrimon encanto! termando... imcando... solly enty rando... sentente! Ia! Ia! Indenti zaggarati g'thxa!
** {{tbox|Alomone continues to recite the scroll. It is a language you have never heard and do not understand at all.}}
** '''Alomone:''' Dintenta! Sententa! Retenta! Q'exjta! Ia! Sottottott! Ia! Dysmenta junque fammatio svelken! Sottey! Sentey! SOLOMENT!
** {{tbox|As Alomone finishes reading from the scroll you hear a shrill scream emanate from Hazeel's coffin.}}
** '''Hazeel:''' My loyal followers. I have pride in you all. Never did I expect to return to this land and I see I have much to attend to.
** '''Hazeel:''' Soon this world will cower once more at the name Hazeel, and my fury will blaze across mine enemies just as my loyal followers gain their rewards.
** {{tbox|Hazeel turns to look at your directly.}}
** '''Hazeel:''' Adventurer. I know that thy efforts were principal in my return to this plane of existence. I offer you my thanks directly.
** '''Hazeel:''' You may not be a follower of Zamorak directly but your cunning and treachery mark you as a friend to the Mahjarrat. Rest assured; I will call on your assistance again.
** '''Hazeel:''' Weak as I am now, my strength shall return, and my followers will be greatly rewarded when my powers peak once more. Join me in my cause as my servant, and all
** '''Hazeel:''' the riches of this plane shall be yours to share, in domination over all who oppose my kind. You would be wise to pledge yourself now while you still may.
** '''Player:''' I serve nobody but myself.
** '''Hazeel:''' Your insolence shall be overlooked this time for I am in truth in your debt. Come close: I shall reward you with wealth such as you deserve.
** '''Hazeel:''' Although your true reward will be later, when Zamorak and I, together, lay waste to this miserable planet, and you are spared as an ally to us.
** {{tbox|Hazeel gives you some coins. They seem to be extremely ancient.}}
** '''Hazeel:''' And now I must leave you loyal subjects for time is short, and I have many pressing matters to address before I may make my return. I must leave now, and head Northwards
** '''Hazeel:''' to join my fellow mahjarrat and regain my strength and powers. I shall return when I am ready to fight my enemies and much blood shall flow across these lands!
** {{tbox|The cultists let out a mighty cheer}}{{Sic|No period.}}
** {{qact|Quest complete}}
* {{tact|If the player does not have the scroll in their inventory:}}
** '''Player:''' Nope, sorry.
** '''Alomone:''' You must find it and bring it to me! Without it we cannot resurrect Hazeel and our efforts to do so will fail!
** {{tact|end}}
